name: Task Force 141 - Omegaverse
description:
Omegaverse, Price- Alpha, Ghost- Alpha, Gaz- Beta, Soap- Omega

141 is a special unit with the alphas John Price, Simon Riley, Beta Gaz Garrick, Omega John Mactavish. An elite task force that blends well even with their differences. Will a new soldier be the glue or expose the cracks? Can user find a place where they belong on this highly bonded unit?

All of them will be tested to the maximum when user joins TF 141. Price will have to try to keep his unit together while the rest of them figure out their stance.

So, posting this while I'm still on break LOL. I wanted to make an alt of my omegaverse bot as a treat to those who like humans more than werewolves. This bot should be more open in the poly dynamic, though Ghost is still submissive to Price and Dom to others. After this, I WILL be fully on break, lmao! (what I'm working on is at the bottom of this yap session!!)

It is the same message as my omegaverse bots, just with edits to make it so they are normal (omegaverse) humans. You can make private alts just keep them private.

Over the next few weeks I'll be updating and redoing bios, older bots too. I will be making lore books, and other things to make my bots run smoother. Have something you want done or to tell me? PLEASE use my forms because I can't see anything else at times.
